CreateSnapshot.volumeId: Disk ID for creating the snapshot; use instance ID for system disks
CreateSnapshot.snapshotName: Snapshot name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1-65
CreateSnapshot.desc: Snapshot description (optional); supports Chinese characters, letters, digits, period ".", space, underscore "_", hyphen "-", equals sign "=", comma "," (English/Chinese), colon ":", slash "/", and Chinese period "。"
CreateSnapshot.retentionInDays: Snapshot retention period; default is -1 (permanent); valid range is 1-10000 days
